01.name: BAU-filters-01
01.description: Complete Filters module — Project Hub + Product Hub. 6 screens designed, ADS tokens probed, JQL architecture specced, 10 outliers defined.

02.name: BAU-story-description-01
02.description: Build new Tiptap-based Description editor to replace ~2MB Atlaskit editor. Mount on Story ticket type only in v1. Reuse useCatyImprove + CatyStreamingOverlay + ph_issues.description_adf storage. 15-button bubble toolbar, @ / : / / inline triggers, View More modal with 5 tabs (4 show 'Coming soon' in v1). History disabled in v1 (no revisions table). PO approval gate before making canonical.

03.name: General-home-r360-01
03.description: Home/R360 enterprise UX pass: ADS token sweep, remove left padding, fix washed-out ring colors, rename Intelligence→Ask Caty, remove ghost Updated-ago text, add enterprise loading state (NO animations). Prior session attempted but commits never landed on disk — needs full restart. Critical lesson logged: NEVER spin/rotate container elements, NEVER use rainbow borders on enterprise UI. Add P0 ENTERPRISE UI GUARDRAIL to CLAUDE.md.

04.name: Projects-boards-manager-01
04.description: Project Board Manager (project-exclusive). Mirror Jira /jira/boards. Listing table (Name/Lead/Location) via JiraTable+useBoards. BIG DIVERGENCE: non-JQL filter picker from ph_saved_filters wired to boards.filter_id. Map statuses reuse MapStatusesPage. Kebab Edit/Copy/Move/Delete (Move=same-type project only, never product, guard via location.projectTypeKey). Star->user_starred_items bridge for 4U/Home. Live Jira board 29 config + filter 10070 captured. New RPCs needed: move_board, copy_board. 6 phases A-F. Token verified working then exposed in chat (rotate).

05.name: General-create-modals-allwork-01
05.description: Create modals ADS rebuild (dropdown-menu, @atlaskit/avatar, 5-level priority, Field labels, dead-CSS purge), RTL+CATY translate on title fields (+ .ttw-root width:100% crunch fix), avatar fix (resolveAvatarUrl src only), BR detail sidebar label/value alignment (tactical — canonical adoption rejected, documented why), Targeted feature checkbox-only, BR update optimistic-update lag fix, AllWork pagination redesign (broken keyset double-.or() -> offset/range + @atlaskit/pagination + WorkListPanel hideFooter). All landed on main + pushed. Includes AllWork 656 vs Backlog 847 by-design explanation. Open: decide AllWork ALLOWED_ISSUE_TYPES scope; optional full CatalystSidebarDetails adoption; linter/parallel-agent collision warning.
